message:
feat(daemon): Add build queue management to BuildHistory

Extends BuildHistory with queue management capabilities for handling builds
when all workers are busy and `queue_when_busy` is enabled.

**New types:**
- `QueuedBuildState`: Represents a build waiting in queue with:
  - Queue position ID, project ID, command
  - Timestamps (queued_at, queued_at_mono for duration tracking)
  - Hook PID for cancellation support
  - Slots needed and estimated start time

**New BuildHistory fields:**
- `queued: RwLock<VecDeque<QueuedBuildState>>` - FIFO queue
- `max_queue_depth: usize` - Limit to prevent unbounded growth (default: 100)
- `next_queue_id: AtomicU64` - Monotonic queue position IDs

**New methods:**
- `with_max_queue_depth(depth)` - Builder method to configure limit
- `next_queue_id()` - Get next queue position
- `enqueue_build(project, cmd, pid, slots)` - Add build to queue
  Returns None if queue is full (when max_queue_depth > 0)
- `dequeue_build()` - Pop next build (FIFO) when worker available
- `cancel_queued_build(id)` - Remove build by ID (user cancellation)
- `queued_builds()` - List all queued builds for status display
- `queue_length()` - Current queue depth

**Design notes:**
- Queue is FIFO (no priority yet - can be added later)
- max_queue_depth=0 means unlimited (use with caution)
- Builds track both wall-clock time (for display) and monotonic time
  (for accurate duration calculation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
